texto: Right now I'll just be happy if you let me know what would you like to have in breakfast ." She swiftly moved from the platform to the fridge and took some bell peppers out of it. I spotted a bowl of boiled noodles. Perhaps, I would be fine with some change in my menu."some noodles will just be fine,a glass of orange juice." I put my glass in the sink and stepped back to have a better view of her amazing body. "and a bed full of you." I added. Oops, I think that was pretty shameless.-Abstruse.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Scarlett Brukett: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Right now I'll just be happy if you let me know what would you like to have in breakfast ." She s…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, erotic, love pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e love.

frase_original: Right now I'll just be happy if you let me know what would you like to have in breakfast ." She swiftly moved from the platform to the fridge and took some bell peppers out of it. I spotted a bowl of boiled noodles. Perhaps, I would be fine with some change in my menu."some noodles will just be fine,a glass of orange juice." I put my glass in the sink and stepped back to have a better view of her amazing body. "and a bed full of you." I added. Oops, I think that was pretty shameless.-Abstruse.
